blogs.title: Palette Color Study
blogs.content: This was a Titanium White (PW6) color study on the majority of colors I like to use. The ratios are full color, 25% TW, 50% TW, 75% TW, and lastly mostly TW with a small amount of the associated color.

blogs.title: Studies with Alia!
blogs.excerpt: A collection of many studies from classes with Alia El-Bermani
blogs.content:
Alia has been my teacher for fine art studies since the fall of 2024 and has taught me much of what I know now, starting with painting a near-life-size figure, drawing, anatomy, composition, materials, and overall exploration of the oil painting medium. Please check out her website at https://alia-fineart.com/.

This collection of studies is in no particular order, but I wish to document these for remembrance and appreciation of a fantastic teacher.
